creator: lefty@spes.gr
text: A bug/issue problem is introduced in FreeBSD 12.1 and vmxnet 3 network driver. After upgrading to FreeBSD 12.1 from 12.0 under ESXi v6.0 and using vmxnet 3, network performance becomes very sluggish. Problem is solved by either switching VM to use E1000 network driver or upgrading to a later ESXi version. Please fix the issue as ESXi upgrading is not always possible. Driver was working very well in 12.0. Thank you
